name: WhatsApp Support Agent
description: 24/7 AI customer support agent for Malaysian SMEs via WhatsApp Business API
longDescription: WhatsApp Support Agent handles customer inquiries, appointment bookings, order tracking, and FAQs automatically via WhatsApp Business API. Built for Malaysian SMEs with BM/EN bilingual support, PDPA compliance, and seamless handoff to human agents. Integrates with Supabase for CRM and leads management.
author: Syncoe <ops@syncoe.com>
features: Human agent handoff for complex issues
useCases: F&B restaurants handling reservation and menu inquiries
Professional services lead qualification and booking
Retail order status and return handling
